title: habranthus howardii
intro: Habranthus howardii, also known as the Howard's Beauty-flowered Habranthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae, native to Mexico. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. Its health benefits include potential uses in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Traditionally, Habranthus howardii is prepared as an infusion or tincture for medicinal purposes.
